synthesis.driver: Renewed US-Iran conflict and Hormuz instability push Brent up $3.85 despite oversupply capping spikes.
synthesis.based_on: Oil surges as Strait of Hormuz is back into ‘full conflict conditions’

takes.oil surges as strait of hormuz is back i: Full conflict in Hormuz raises war premium, pushing oil prices higher.
takes.shipowners wrestle with hormuz risks as: Shipping risks in Hormuz amplify supply concerns, supporting higher oil prices.
takes.oil prices surge and markets fall after: Ceasefire collapse escalates tensions, driving oil prices higher.
takes.trump says he s not sure he wants iran d: US-Iran deal uncertainty fuels market anxiety, adding to upward price pressure.
